name: Hot Clam Dip 2
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, melt the butter and sauté the garlic and onion until the onion is transparent.
2. Add in 4 cans of clams, using the juice from only 2 cans and replacing the remaining juices with water.
3. Cook on low heat for about 3 minutes.
4. Add all other ingredients (lemon juice, oregano, parsley, flavored breadcrumbs, chicken broth, Parmesan cheese) and mix well. If it seems too thick, add a little water until you have a slightly thick consistency.
5. Transfer to a baking dish and bake at 400 degrees for 15-20 minutes.
6. Serve hot on party rye breads. Do not use any salt as the clams and Parmesan cheese are salty enough! Also, add a dash of red pepper or tabasco if you like your dips spicy! Enjoy!
